headline: Retail Investors Are Beating Wall Street Benchmarks With AI Stocks. Why That Could Change Soon.
summary: Retail investors have outperformed Wall Street benchmarks in 2026 by concentrating on leading AI stocks like Micron and Nvidia, raising the question of whether their winning streak can continue.

headline: JPMorgan sets jaw-dropping Tesla stock price target
summary: For the better part of a decade, JPMorgan was one of Tesla's most reliable institutional bears. Ryan Brinkman, who covered the stock for the bank since 2015, told investors to sell through earnings beats, record highs, and multiple cycles of Wall Street enthusiasm. His final target of $145, ...

headline: JPMorgan, Citi, and Bank of America Just Built a Tokenized Payment Network to Kill Stablecoins
summary: JPMorgan, Citi, Bank of America, and Wells Fargo are building a shared Tokenized Deposit Network to challenge stablecoins. It goes through The Clearing House, targeting a first-half 2027 launch, and the Federal Reserve is the audience that matters most.The stated pitch is efficiency: instant 24/7 settlement, programmable payments, blockchain-speed money ...
